name: vague-brief-requires-clarification
expected_behavior: Does not touch the filesystem — writes no files, runs no scaffolding
Asks the user for the four things the brief is missing: purpose (one sentence), trigger phrases, the 80% workflow, scope boundaries
Presents the questions concisely — not a long preamble explaining what skills are
Waits for the user's reply before proceeding to step 2
Does not invent a purpose or guess at triggers
failure_modes: Creates a generic 'helper' skill without clarifying
Writes a placeholder SKILL.md with TODO markers
Picks a random purpose and asks the user to confirm after the fact
Gives a lecture on skill authoring instead of asking the four questions
Asks only one question and then proceeds with partial information
